message:
feat(layout): register Pie in concrete layout algorithm list

Add LayoutAlgorithm::Pie to the concrete_layout_algorithms() array
(11→12 entries), making it available to the layout selection and
fallback machinery alongside the existing flowchart, sequence,
class, state, er, gantt, journey, git, mindmap, timeline, and
block-beta algorithms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
